ac_results.note: Deferred (whole-doc) section present and distinct from per-AC deferred items
Data-driven zero-section invariant; --strict exits non-zero naming offenders
Default mode degrade-and-report; INDEX always written; Coverage gaps section present
No double-listing; idempotent (orthogonal doc-level vs AC-row data sources)
Close-policy prose in both WORKFLOW.md and VALIDATION.prompt.md; required phrases grep-verified
Guard implemented and report-only; TEST-006 negative control (SPEC-9101) green. Latent inline-code-span false-positive noted (W1+W2); spec's stated negative control test is green.
No regression; TEST-001..007 registered before known-failing test_index_continue_on_error

findings.title: findOpenDecisionMarker does not strip inline code spans
findings.breaking_input: A done doc containing the line: `   unresolved decision — e.g. a \`WARNING\`/\`> [!WARNING]\` line combined with an`
findings.effect: Guard fires on SPEC-0006 line 93 when SPEC-0006 transitions to status:done. Report-only, no gate change. Latent.
findings.fix: Strip inline code spans before /\bWARNING\b/ test: `const stripped = raw.replace(/`[^`\n]*`/g, '');`

findings.title: TEST-006 negative control missing inline-code-span case
findings.breaking_input: Add line `See \`WARNING: unresolved\` in inline code.` to SPEC-9101 without the W1 fix; guard fires and test fails
findings.effect: Inline-code-span false-positive case is untested; the negative control gap is the direct test-coverage counterpart of W1.
findings.fix: Add an inline-code-span line to SPEC-9101 fixture: `See \`WARNING: this mentions unresolved as an example\` — not a real decision.`

findings.title: `d.legacy` boolean vs `d.status='legacy'` frontmatter disambiguation
findings.note: Correct behavior; a comment would prevent future confusion between no-frontmatter legacy (d.legacy=true) and frontmatter status:legacy (d.legacy=false but status='legacy').

findings.title: Fence-length not checked in findOpenDecisionMarker
findings.note: CommonMark closing fence must be >= opener length; not checked. Very low risk in the doc corpus; only causes false negatives (misses markers), not false positives.

findings.title: Close-policy enforced only via validator-agent instruction, not a hard gate
findings.note: By design per SPEC-0006 DD-5: escalation to gate deferred until signal proven clean.

adversarial_focus_verdict: CONFIRMED — inline-code-span false positive in findOpenDecisionMarker is a genuine correctness bug. Latent, report-only, clear fix. Test coverage gap is real. Severity: WARNING (not ERROR); does not block merge.

other_checks.zero_section_membership: SAFE — all 9 non-legacy DOC_STATUS_ENUM values covered by exactly one placement array
other_checks.double_counting_deferred: SAFE — doc-level and AC-row-level deferred are orthogonal data structures
other_checks.degrade_report_integrity: SAFE — process.exit(1) only under strict; default path always writes INDEX
other_checks.idempotence: SAFE — coverageGaps set is deterministic; same input -> same output
other_checks.redos: SAFE — OPEN_DECISION_TOKEN_RE uses flat alternations; linear time
